metaTitle: Metadata Remover — Strip Hidden Privacy Data from Images & PDFs (100% Private)
metaDescription: See and remove hidden GPS, camera info, and author data from your photos, PDFs, and DOCX files. 100% local processing—your files never leave your device.
introSummary: Did you know your photos contain your exact GPS coordinates and device serial numbers? Or that your PDFs reveal who edited them and when? Our 'Deep-Scan' engine exposes this hidden metadata and lets you wipe it clean with one click. Built on a 'Zero-Server' architecture, all processing happens entirely in your browser's RAM. It's the ultimate privacy shield for sharing documents and photos safely in a digital world.

contextUsage.title: For Social Media Privacy
contextUsage.desc: Before uploading photos to Reddit, Twitter, or Discord, strip away GPS tags that could reveal your home address.

contextUsage.title: For Professional Documents
contextUsage.desc: Clean PDF and DOCX properties to ensure clients or competitors can't see internal author names or edit history.

contextUsage.title: For Classified Content
contextUsage.desc: Safely share sensitive screenshots or ID scans by removing device fingerprints and timestamps.

howto.description: Drag and drop any JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF, or DOCX file. Our scanner works instantly on files up to 50MB.
Review the 'Risk Summary' to see high-risk items like GPS coordinates, camera models, and author tags.
Click 'Strip All Metadata'. Our engine physically recreates the file without any hidden data structures.
Save your 'Clean' version. You can now share it anywhere knowing your privacy is 100% protected.

why: Deep-Scan Technology — We don't just hide tags; we scan EXIF, XMP, IPTC, and Document Properties for total exposure.
Physical Data Destruction — Unlike simple 'hide' tools, we re-render images to ensure original metadata is physically unrecoverable.
Zero-Server Guarantee — Just like our slogan 'Your file is yours', your data never touches a server. All work is done in your RAM.
Risk-Level Categorization — We highlight sensitive fields in red so you know exactly what information was at risk.
Multi-Format Support — One tool for everything: images, professional PDFs, and office documents.
100% Free & Unlimited — No subscriptions, no limits on file count. Just pure utility for your digital safety.

faq.q: What kind of metadata can you remove?
faq.a: We remove everything from GPS locations and camera settings (EXIF) to author names, software versions, and creation dates (XMP/Metadata).

faq.q: Does stripping metadata reduce image quality?
faq.a: For images, we re-render at 95% quality by default to ensure all hidden data is wiped. For PDFs and DOCX, the content remains identical while only the properties are cleared.

faq.q: How is this safer than other online tools?
faq.a: Most tools upload your file to their server. HugDot processes everything locally on your CPU. If you disconnect your internet, the tool still works!

faq.q: Can I see what was removed?
faq.a: Yes! Our inspection panel lists every single piece of metadata found before you decide to strip it.

troubleshooting: File not loading? Ensure it's not password-protected. We cannot scan encrypted PDFs for security reasons.
GPS still showing? After stripping, our tool generates a NEW file. Make sure you are using the version with '-clean' in the filename.
Browser lag? For very large PDFs, the 'Deep-Scan' might take a few seconds. Stay on the tab until it finishes.
proTips: Always use the 'Inspection' phase to audit your files. You'll be surprised what your phone's camera stores by default!
Strip metadata from your Resume/CV before sending it to recruiters to look more professional.
Combined with our 'Face Blur' tool, this provides a complete identity protection suite for your photos.
